title.en: As soon as he entered here, Ye Tian was shocked...

content.en:
The Nine Swords Cliff is very large, about the size of a small extradimensional realm, and the spatial suppression inside is terrifying.

Even Ye Tian in the third realm, after entering here, he felt a heavy oppression.

If you enter the first realm here, you will definitely have to smash your physical body.

Under normal circumstances, there is no such treasure land, but once the Lord of the Nine Swords Realm came here to break through, even if the breakthrough failed, at least he also spied on the mystery of the Fifth Realm, and a little bit of the power of the Fifth Realm was almost integrated here, which could make unimaginable changes here.

The Nine Swords Cliff is so huge, not all places are conducive to comprehending the extradimensional rules, only the most core area of the Nine Swords Cliff is there that is conducive to comprehending the extradimensional rules.

Ye Tian soon came here and saw the cliff face that was infected with a lot of blood.

As soon as he entered here, Ye Tian was shocked by the blood-colored cliff.

"This is the blood of the Nine Swords Realm Lord, staining this cliff red, and causing a huge evolution here!"

Vaguely, he felt that this blood had already partially transformed, containing the mysteries of the Fifth Realm, and after countless years of evolution, it would be so miraculous.

But with such a release of energy, this place will eventually become ordinary one day.

Of course.

These hegemon-level forces are still able to delay the situation of 470.

He observed for a while, and there was already an incomparably mysterious formation around him, which should be the fourth realm arrangement, just to delay the dissipation of energy.

At this time, there are some third realms here that are contemplating, but there is no existence of the fourth realm.

"That's right, although the Nine Swords Cliff is helpful for comprehending the extradimensional rules, it definitely doesn't help the existence of the fourth realm. "

Subsequently.

Ye Tian found a place here, sat cross-legged, and began to comprehend this blood-colored cliff.

Rumble!!!!

As soon as his consciousness touched the blood-colored cliff, it was as if he had entered a blood-colored world.

There are countless drops of blood in the blood-colored world, and each drop of blood is like an extradimensional realm, containing countless stripes inside, and each stripe is the embodiment of extradimensional rules.

"It's so mysterious, no wonder this place helps to improve the extradimensional rules!"

When Ye Tian was contemplating this blood-colored cliff, the other replicating bodies immediately cast multi-dimensional wisdom light, which made the comprehension skyrocket many times, and the thinking was also improved in an unimaginable multi-dimensionality, and it became extremely easy to comprehend the extradimensional rules.

The multi-dimensional wisdom light, coupled with this blood-colored cliff, made Ye Tianru (BAAF) progress far faster than any time in the past.

Time passes slowly.

This drop of blood gradually did not help him much, and he began to understand another drop of blood.

In the days that followed, Ye Tian continued to comprehend, and the realm of extradimensional rules was also skyrocketing at an incredible speed.

On this day, Ye Tian's extra-dimensional rules finally reached the realm of two extra-dimensional rules.

Time has passed since one extradimensional epoch after another.

Ye Tian has been doing his best to comprehend the extradimensional rules, but his progress has been completely covered up by him, even the several superdimensional forces guarding the Nine Swords Cliff are not aware of it, but they will not pay attention to the third realm like Ye Tian.

After all, only a hundred extradimensional epochs have no effect on them, and there is no point in them paying attention.

Flash.

Fifty extradimensional epochs have passed, which means that he has consumed half of his time.

At this time.

He had already comprehended the nine extradimensional rules, which was unimaginable progress in the past!

In the past, it was extremely difficult for him to comprehend one extradimensional rule, let alone nine extradimensional rules, and it only took fifty extradimensional eras.

"As long as you make further progress and comprehend the realm of ten transcendent dimensional rules, it is equivalent to comprehending twenty percent of the transcendent rules, and you are qualified to meet the minimum requirements for impacting the fourth realm!" Ye Tian said excitedly.

In the Third Realm, many of the Third Realm penances have been cultivated for endless years, but they can't meet the requirements of impacting the Fourth Realm, because it is really too difficult to comprehend the ten extradimensional rules!

And comprehending the ten extradimensional rules is only the minimum requirement, and if you hit the fourth realm, the success rate is estimated to be less than one percent.

If you want to break through to the fourth realm 100%, you must comprehend a hundred extradimensional rules.

One hundred extra-dimensional rules, in the division of the realm of extra-dimensional rules, are only equivalent to the realm of thirty percent.

"With a hundred extra-dimensional rules, it is almost unheard of to use this realm to attack the third realm of the fourth realm. "

Ye Tian had also learned about the impact of the Fourth Realm, on the side of the Five Thousand Realm, the Fourth Realm originally used twenty or thirty extra-dimensional rules to impact the Fourth Realm, and finally broke through by luck, and some of them failed to break through for the first time, and the foundation was damaged, and then they found an amazing opportunity to recover from their injuries, and then they succeeded in impacting the Fourth Realm again.

"Let's continue to comprehend first, and strive to comprehend the ten extradimensional rules as soon as possible!"

Ye Tian continued to comprehend.

In the blink of an eye, fifty extradimensional epochs had passed.

At this time.

Ye Tian's progress was already very small, not that his multi-dimensional wisdom light was useless, but that the Nine Sword Cliff was not of much help to him.

Just because he had already comprehended fifteen extradimensional rules, such progress was already extremely fast.

After all, the Nine Swords Cliff is just a treasure land promoted by external forces, and it is not too high, and for the third realm that comprehends the fifteen extradimensional rules, it is naturally not of much help here.

Tricky Wood Red Dragon would never have imagined that he would raise the realm of extradimensional rules to such an astonishing level just by coming here for enlightenment.

With his current extra-dimensional rule realm, plus some treasures that assist in impacting the fourth realm, plus the extra-dimensional realm in his body is extremely perfect, maybe there is a chance of about thirty percent of the impact on the fourth realm now.

For many third realms, a thirty percent chance of hitting the fourth realm is already a high probability.

But Ye Tian hadn't even reached the peak of the third realm of cultivation now, so naturally he wouldn't rush to the fourth realm.

"It's time for you to come out!"

The third realm guarded by the Nine Swords Cliff came over and urged.

"Thank you!"

Ye Tian went out from the Nine Swords Cliff.

And after leaving, he vaguely sensed the slightest snooping, but in the end he did not continue to follow.

Wow!

Ye Tian left quickly, and left the territory of Wuren Zero No. 1 very quickly.

After that, he won't come either.

If the Nine Swords Cliff is still helpful to him, he really wants to take the risk of taking the Nine Swords Realm Master Token and changing his identity to pick up the wool, but there is a high probability that it will not work, after all, the token is the same, and it is easy to see.

"The realm of extra-dimensional rules has been raised to the level of fifteen realms, if I raise my cultivation to the peak realm of the third realm, relying on the wisdom body of the new Ka Ye, my combat power may be enough to match the existence of the fourth realm that has just broken through!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.
